signals.title: Oil / Geopolitical
signals.text: Watch for potential risk-off at Sydney open as WTI oil hovers above $94.9 ahead of weekend risk. Key level to watch: USD/JPY 159.33 at the open.

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme + CAD Stren
signals.text: Watch for CAD/EUR cross at the open; CAD was the strongest G8 currency this week with 1W avg: +0.431%, while EUR was weakest with 1W avg: -0.481%. Key level to watch: EUR/CAD 1.472 at the open.

signals.title: BoJ — This Week
signals.text: Watch for potential JPY volatility at the open as BoJ meeting takes place on Tuesday. Key level to watch: USD/JPY 159.33 at the open.

signals.title: AUD/USD COT Positioning
signals.text: AUD/USD net long positioning at 74.3% with extreme retail short bias; watch for potential reversal at the open. Key level to watch: AUD/USD 0.7151 at the open.

signals.title: Yield Curve Context
signals.text: US yield curve in bull flattener regime; 2s10s spread at +52.0bp. Watch for implications on CB divergence and cross-asset risk narrative.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: Watch for short-squeeze risk at the open, NZD/USD net short -18,062 vs 40% OIS priced for RBNZ hike, closed at 0.5881. Catalyst: RBNZ meeting on 27 May.

signals.title: Yield Curve — Bull Flattener
signals.text: Regime context: 2s10s spread +52.0bp in bull flattener regime, watch for implications on CB divergence signals and cross-asset risk narrative.

signals.title: BoJ — This Week
signals.text: Watch for BoJ meeting on 28 Apr, potential impact on JPY crosses and market sentiment.
